title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Roger, Whitebeard Pirates, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Whitebeard as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GuRARARA RARARARA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a load of crap, Roger! Are you a kid by any chance?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Uahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Someone knows it

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I was so stunned that I couldn't move."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "He'd already left me speechless twice. Who is this guy, anyway?"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please let me borrow open for one year, newgate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This is my last request!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with him by my side, I know I can get to the final island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, why are you deciding this by yourself?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What's happening?!

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: Captain Roger's Bowing to Whitebeard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard Pirates
dialogue.text: Stop it Captain!!! they're our rivals!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I beg you, ooden! Please sail with us for one year!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop it! This is shameful! You shouldn't bow to me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit screwing around, Roger! Do you really think I'll let you take a member of my family?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Uaaaah! The old man is pissed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I could feel my blood pumping, even though I tried to hide it..."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "What do these stones have to do with the Kozuki clan?!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Was this meeting with Roger a mere coincidence?!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Whitey- Chan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: "Before I could even think straight..."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: "I already had my answer."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to get to the bottom of this. Please let me go with them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You look disgusted!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No kidding, of course I hate the idea!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We're brothers aren't we?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it's only for a year, whitey- chan... please?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We'll stay here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We prefer this ship, so we'll wait for you return here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Sure! You've all become amazing pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you're free to choose what you want to do!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Pops! Aren't you going to say goodbye?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Someone who

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Roger gave us all the treasure on his ship as a thank you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's incredible, there's so much!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: and supplies too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Give those supplies back right now, idiots!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you want Oden and his family to starve to death?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Y-Yes sir!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: See you soon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Don't forget to bring back some souvenirs!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was then that the second chapter of my life as a pirate had begun!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The beginning of a new adventure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Whitey-chan is a great man, but...

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: Roger is Incompable! Lucky me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been a while since I last held a baby!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: So their names are momonosuke and Hyogorori?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They remind me of my childhood...

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: Captain Roger, we found spies!!!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: inuarashi! Nekomamushi! What are you doing here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We had so much fun with you, Oden-sama!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! The cat and dog are gone too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Those idiots!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 54 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
